channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Shipping firms seek clarifications before crossing Hormuz
item.description: Shipping companies said several things had to be clarified, including the presence of mines, Iranian conditions.

item.title: What has Trump said before possible US-Iran talks and what could it mean?
item.description: In rapid-fire posts, Trump says Iran will give up nuclear material and 'never close' Hormuz, but questions remain.

item.title: Inside Kharg Island, Iran’s oil lifeline under threat
item.description: With the US blockading Iran’s ports, Kharg Island is in focus. How are civilians caught in the middle?

item.title: Macron demands assurances after Iran opens Strait of Hormuz
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron said he welcomed the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and the Lebanon ceasefire.

item.title: Southern Lebanon’s only functioning hospital damaged by Israeli strikes
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Obaida Hitto reports from Tibnin Hospital - the only functioning hospital in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Ukraine’s long-range strikes prompt new Russian threat against Europe
item.description: Ukraine has penetrated Russian airspace with unprecedented numbers of drones, denying Russia windfall oil profits.

item.title: Can Pakistan secure Iran-US nuclear compromise, as Trump says deal ‘close’?
item.description: Pakistan's civilian and army leaders shuttle between key capitals as Trump says he may visit Islamabad to sign a deal.

item.title: Iran foreign minister says Strait of Hormuz ‘completely open’
item.description: Iran says 'passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz' open during the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

item.title: The three clocks of the Iran war
item.description: Trump is racing against the midterms, Iran is betting on endurance, and Netanyahu needs a war with no end.

item.title: The Iran war has exposed the limits of neutrality
item.description: From Gulf energy shocks to divisions among allies, the conflict has made strategic ambiguity harder to sustain.
